name: smart-scan-storage
description: Smart Scan Storage with OCR, search and page stitching

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd client && npm install && cd ../server && npm install
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.test:unit: cd server && npm run test:unit && cd ../client && npm run test:unit
scripts.test:all: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend && npm run test:e2e
